p: RestoreCord is a Discord Recovery Service, that allows you to restore your Discord Guild after being nuked, raided, or otherwise lost. It is simple, easy to use and been around since 2020, and is still growing.
RestoreCord has multiple use cases:
Verification Service
Transfer Members between Old and New Server
Light Alt Detection

RestoreCord uses Discords oAuth2 feature which gives their users the ability to add Applications/Bots to their accounts. With special permissions, RestoreCord can “pull” users to specified users. This WILL NOT grant anyone access to your account or WON’T steal your account token/email/password. RestoreCord is entirely safe.
Check out our Documentation at https://docs.restorecord.com/ or create a topic at https://community.restorecord.com/
This is a Step-by-Step guide on how to setup custom bot ready for RestoreCord
Due to security reasons, it is highly recommended to create an additional Discord Account for this step. Read this before proceeding. Setup a Custom Bot
Navigate to https://discord.com/developers/applications/
Login if required.
Create a new application by clicking on New Application. And give your Application an awesome name.
After creating an Application, click on oAuth2.
Then click on Add Redirect.
You have successfully setup redirect url for custom bots.
Finding some required information about your bot might be hard, here a step-by-step guide:
After creating a Bot, click on "Reset Token" to reveal its secret Tokens. then copy the Token...
Click on oAuth2. under CLIENT ID, click Copy...
Click on oAuth2, on the right hand side of the screen, under CLIENT SECRET, click "Reset Secret". then copy the CLIENT SECRET
Dora The Explorer found several information about their bot.
If you want to create a custom bot, you must fill out this form with the curresponding information:
Bot Name
ClientID
Bot Token
Bot Secret
Setup a Custom Bot
After filling out the form, don't forget to click on Create!
You have completely setup a custom bot ready for RestoreCord.

l: How to create a server on RestoreCord.
p: Navigate to https://restorecord.com/dashboard/settings and create a new server. Then fill out the requested information:
Server Name
GuildId / ServerID
Role ID (The role the user received when they verify)
Choose the a custom bot you want to use for this server.
After filling out the form, don't forget to click on Create!
You have successfully created a server on RestoreCord
[WIP]
[WIP]
[WIP]
[WIP]
Make sure that the bot has access to giving out verify role to users by putting the bot role above the "verified role.
Due to security reason, we highly recommend you taking these steps before bringing your custom bot to production.
Priority
Suggestion
Description
Create an Application Team
Add your bot to an application team.
Multiple team members
Invite as many accounts in your team as you can, incase you lose access to your bot, you will still have access to your Discord Bot.
Use a VPN
To prevent Discord banning all of your accounts using the same IP Address, avoid using any free VPNs/Proxies.
Use an appropriate bot name
Please DO NOT try to impersonate other popular Bots such as MEE6, Dyno, Wick or even RestoreCord, these names might get flagged by Discord which would eventually lead to a Bot deletion.
If you're getting error messages such as:
You should look at the possible solutions:
Possible Solutions
Is your bot in the Server?
Does your bot have permissions?
Make sure that the bot role is above the verified role.
